description_long: This object is a vintage record player with a rectangular wooden base and a hinged dust cover that is currently open. The base features a dark brown finish with a slightly raised border and a circular emblem on the front panel. On top, there is a mechanical assembly with visible pipes, gears, and a turntable platter, all rendered in a metallic gray color. The dust cover appears textured and somewhat worn, with a reddish-brown hue and a rough, uneven surface. The tonearm and associated mechanisms are prominently displayed, with metallic components and a lever extending toward the platter. The overall appearance suggests an early 20th-century design, with a mix of wood and metal materials and a utilitarian, industrial aesthetic.
description: A vintage wooden record player with an open, textured dust cover and exposed metallic mechanisms on top. The design features a dark brown base, a circular emblem, and a prominent tonearm assembly.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open dust cover, the metallic mechanism, and the circular emblem on the front panel.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the mechanical assembly, the open dust cover, and the lever extending toward the platter.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the back of the dust cover and the side of the wooden base, with less detail visible on the mechanical parts.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the inside of the open dust cover and the back of the record player, with the mechanical assembly partially visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and centrally located on the top surface, appearing as a flat, circular component made of metal. It is medium-sized relative to the base, with a dark gray color and subtle grooves or ridges visible on its surface. The finish is matte, and the platter is partially surrounded by the mechanical assembly.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and extends from the right side of the mechanical assembly toward the platter. It is medium in length, with a visible joint and a lever-like structure, and has a matte gray finish. The tonearm appears to be raised above the platter.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of a textured, reddish-brown material that appears to be wood or a similar opaque substance. It is attached to the base with visible hinges and is currently in the open position, revealing the internal components. The cover has a rough, uneven surface and no visible handle.
